kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Either Bridgegate goes with 9 coins or someone in the Joiners' Guild goes with 7 coins (but not both).
Godfrey, Blacksmith, Tapestries, and 9 coins belong to different artisans.
Mason goes with exactly two of Wulfric, Rope, Oldwall, and 7 coins.
Exactly two members of the Clothiers' Guild are in the Hill Ward.
8 coins goes with Boots if and only if Fletcher goes with Millpond.
Either Millpond goes with Potter or someone in the Joiners' Guild goes with Barrels (but not both).
Between 6 coins and 10 coins, one goes with Cooper and the other with Potter.

If either someone in the Hill Ward goes with 8 coins or the artisan with 6 coins belongs to the Hill Ward (but not both), then either 10 coins goes with Pottery or Mason goes with Southgate (but not both).
Blacksmith, Potter, and 9 coins go with Aldric, Boots, and Rope, in some order.
Matilda's levy is higher than both the Mason and the artisan who makes Boots.
Beatrix goes with none of Fletcher, 7 coins, or 9 coins.
The artisan in Millpond's levy is lower than both Godfrey and the Cooper.
Southgate goes with exactly two of Godfrey, Mason, Pottery, and 10 coins.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Either Birchpool goes with 5 lb or someone in the Pike Family goes with 3 lb (but not both).
Mabel, Bass, Wobbler, and 5 lb belong to different catches.
Crappie goes with exactly two of Wade, Swimbait, Mossbank, and 3 lb.
Exactly two members of the Catfish Family are in the South Watershed.
4 lb goes with Spinnerbait if and only if Catfish goes with Grayreach.
Either Grayreach goes with Perch or someone in the Pike Family goes with Crankbait (but not both).
Between 2 lb and 6 lb, one goes with Bluegill and the other with Perch.

If either someone in the South Watershed goes with 4 lb or the catch with 2 lb belongs to the South Watershed (but not both), then either 6 lb goes with Spoon or Crappie goes with Pinehollow (but not both).
Bass, Perch, and 5 lb go with Cody, Spinnerbait, and Swimbait, in some order.
Royce's weight is higher than both the angler who landed the Crappie and the angler using the Spinnerbait.
Esther goes with none of Catfish, 3 lb, or 5 lb.
The angler at Grayreach's weight is lower than both Mabel and the angler who landed the Bluegill.
Pinehollow goes with exactly two of Mabel, Crappie, Spoon, and 6 lb.
